abilities.name: Lucky Draw
abilities.description: 50% chance to gain a luck token, 50% chance to gain weakness

abilities.name: Russian Roulette
abilities.description: 33% chance to shoot killer, 33% chance to hurt yourself, 33% chance to misfire

abilities.name: Health Gamble
abilities.description: Randomize your max health (requires 1 luck token)

abilities.name: Reset
abilities.description: Reset luck tokens and weakness (requires 3 tokens)
